children.heading: Approval
children.label: 1 Approval
children.text: The 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-FSM Compact and the 2023 U.S.-FSM Trust Fund Agreement, as submitted to Congress on , are approved and incorporated by reference.June 15, 2023

children.label: A
children.text: the 2023 U.S.-FSM Fiscal Procedures Agreement, as submitted to Congress on ; andJune 15, 2023

children.label: B
children.text: the 2023 U.S.-FSM Federal Programs and Services Agreement.

children.heading: Authority of President
children.label: 3 Authority of President
children.text: Notwithstanding , the President is authorized to bring into force and implement the agreements described in paragraphs (1) and (2).section 1921(f) of this title

children.heading: Republic of the Marshall Islands
children.label: b Republic of the Marshall Islands

children.heading: Approval
children.label: 1 Approval
children.text: The 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-RMI Compact and the 2023 U.S.-RMI Trust Fund Agreement, as submitted to Congress on , are approved and incorporated by reference.October 17, 2023

children.heading: Consent of Congress
children.label: 2 Consent of Congress
children.text: Congress consents to the 2023 U.S.-RMI Fiscal Procedures Agreement, as submitted to Congress on .October 17, 2023

children.heading: Authority of President
children.label: 3 Authority of President
children.text: Notwithstanding , the President is authorized to bring into force and implement the agreements described in paragraphs (1) and (2).section 1921(f) of this title

children.heading: Approval
children.label: 1 Approval
children.text: The 2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement, as submitted to Congress on , is approved.June 15, 2023

children.heading: Authority of President
children.label: 2 Authority of President
children.text: The President is authorized to bring into force and implement the 2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement.

children.heading: Amendments, changes, or termination to Compacts and certain agreements
children.label: d Amendments, changes, or termination to Compacts and certain agreements

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Any amendment to, change to, or termination of all or any part of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact, 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact, or the U.S.-Palau Compact, by mutual agreement or unilateral action of the Government of the United States, shall not enter into force until the date on which Congress has incorporated the applicable amendment, change, or termination into an Act of Congress.

children.label: A
children.text: any action of the Government of the United States under the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact, 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact, or U.S.-Palau Compact, including an action taken pursuant to section 431, 441, or 442 of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact, 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact, or U.S.-Palau Compact; and

children.label: i
children.text: the agreement described in section 462(a)(2) of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact;

children.label: ii
children.text: the agreement described in section 462(a)(5) of the 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact;

children.label: iii
children.text: an agreement concluded pursuant to section 265 of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact;

children.label: iv
children.text: an agreement concluded pursuant to section 265 of the 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact;

children.label: v
children.text: an agreement concluded pursuant to section 177 of the 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact;

children.label: vi
children.text: Articles III and IV of the agreement described in section 462(b)(6) of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact;

children.label: vii
children.text: Articles III, IV, and X of the agreement described in section 462(b)(6) of the 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact;

children.label: viii
children.text: the agreement described in section 462(h) of the U.S.-Palau Compact; and

children.label: ix
children.text: Articles VI, XV, and XVII of the agreement described in section 462(b)(7) of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact and 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact and section 462(i) of the U.S.-Palau Compact.

children.heading: Entry into force of future amendments to subsidiary agreements
children.label: e Entry into force of future amendments to subsidiary agreements
A
children.text: the agreement to amend, change, or terminate the subsidiary agreement;

children.label: B
children.text: an explanation of the amendment, change, or termination;

children.label: C
children.text: a description of the reasons for the amendment, change, or termination; and

children.label: i
children.text: the necessity of the amendment, change, or termination; and

children.label: ii
children.text: any impacts of the amendment, change, or termination.

children.heading: Federal programs and services agreement with the republic of Palau
children.label: 2 Federal programs and services agreement with the republic of Palau
children.text: Subparagraphs (A) and (D)(iii) of and subsection (d)(2)(A) shall not apply to an agreement that would amend, change, or terminate the agreement described in section 462(f) of the U.S.-Palau Compact.section 1931(c)(2) of this title
